source_pr.title: executor, util: reset offsets and nullBitMap for MutRow when setting new values
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #29947 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test


Side effects

N/A

Documentation

N/A

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
Fix the problem that window function may return different results when using transaction or not.
```

symptoms: result := tk.MustQuery("select * from (select count(*) over (partition by ref_0.c_0b6nxb order by ref_0.c_3pcik) as c0 from t_tir89b as ref_0) as subq_0 where subq_0.c0 <> 1;") (executor/window_test.go)
failure_signature: result := tk.MustQuery("select * from (select count(*) over (partition by ref_0.c_0b6nxb order by ref_0.c_3pcik) as c0 from t_tir89b as ref_0) as subq_0 where subq_0.c0 <> 1;") (executor/window_test.go)
fix_pattern: result := tk.MustQuery("select * from (select count(*) over (partition by ref_0.c_0b6nxb order by ref_0.c_3pcik) as c0 from t_tir89b as ref_0) as subq_0 where subq_0.c0 <> 1;") (executor/window_test.go)

evidence: evidence: result := tk.MustQuery("select * from (select count(*) over (partition by ref_0.c_0b6nxb order by ref_0.c_3pcik) as c0 from t_tir89b as ref_0) as subq_0 where subq_0.c0 <> 1;") (executor/window_test.go)
